code: import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import api from"../api/axios";import"./styles/AdminManageLibrarians.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function AdminLibrarians(){const[librarians,setLibrarians]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{fetchLibrarians();},[]);const fetchLibrarians=async()=>{try{const res=await api.get("/admin/librarians");setLibrarians(res.data);}catch(err){console.log("Error fetching librarians");}};const handleDelete=async id=>{try{await api.delete(`/admin/librarians/${id}`);setLibrarians(prev=>prev.filter(lib=>lib._id!==id));}catch(err){console.log("Delete failed");}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"admin-page",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"admin-title",children:"Manage Librarians"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"admin-container",children:librarians.map(lib=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"admin-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:lib.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:lib.email})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"delete-btn",onClick:()=>handleDelete(lib._id),children:"\uD83D\uDDD1 Delete"})]},lib._id))})]});}export default AdminLibrarians;
